title: 6 ps and grep Commands for Quick Process Checks
summary: Inspect running processes faster with ps and grep commands for service lookup, process-name checks, and lightweight runtime debugging.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with ps and grep

verification_setup: Confirm ps and grep are installed.
Replace the example process names or command fragments before running the commands.
Run the commands while the target services are active if you want meaningful matches.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/ps_and_grep_commands_for_quick_process_checks.sh on a local machine with running processes.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally with disposable helper processes whose command lines matched the examples. Broader patterns such as redis or postgres can still return multiple related matches.
